steps.assistant_text: Whole-function coloring rotation cracked via 3 coupled levers (diagnosed with -Wo,-zdbug:6 uoptlist): (1) copy-def entry *P=*P+1; counter=*P; un-coalesces the entry load, folded-sum candidate burns the t7 slot shifting temp pool +2; (2) dead-param arg-reuse lifts counter's priority to color FIRST into a0; (3) NEW LEVER dead while(0){idx=counter*4;} — analoop weights the dead body as a loop before controlflow deletes it (zero emission), multiplying idx's LR refs above the base's so idx colors v1, base a1.
